VALIDATION_MESSAGES.AT_LEAST_ONE_ITEM_SHOULD_BE_GREATER_THAN: At least one {{item}} should be greater than 0
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.EARLIEST_ARRIVAL_SHOULD_BE_EARLIER_THAN_: Earliest delivery/pick-up time should be earlier than latest delivery/pick-up time
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.EARLIEST_DESPATCH_SHOULD_BE_EARLIER_THAN: Earliest dispatch time should be earlier than latest dispatch time
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.EXPIRY_DATE_MUST_BE_AFTER_START_DATE: Expiry date must be after start date
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.MUST_BE_A_VALID_EMAIL_ADDRESS: Must be a valid Email address
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.MUST_BE_A_VALID_PHONE_NUMBER: Must be a valid Phone Number
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.OVERTIME_SHOULD_BE_EARLIER_THAN_SUPER_OV: Overtime should be earlier than super overtime
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.FIELD_SHOULD_BE_LESS_THAN_MAX_LENGTH_CHA: Field cannot contain more than {{maxLength}} characters
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.SUM_OF_DURATIONS_SHOULD_BE_LESS_THAN_TOT: The total of delay stop time and fixed stop time must be less than or equal to total stop time
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.VALUE_SHOULD_BE_BETWEEN_MIN_AND_MAX: The value should be between {{min}} and {{max}}
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.ONLY_ONE_POSSIBLE_VALUE_BECAUSE_MULTITRI: Value can only be {{value}} because multi-tripping is disabled
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.MAXIMUM_WORKING_TIME_RTD: The total of maximum working time to break and further working time to second break must not exceed 24 hours
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.READ_ONLY_STANDARD_PLANNING: Only the 'Standard Planning' role can be used with the 'Read Only' License
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.ROUTE_NUMBERS_VALIDATION_MESSAGE: Enter value in the required format (Eg: 1-3,4,7-10)

VALIDATION_MESSAGES.SPEED_ADJUSTMENT_AREA_NAME_VALIDATION_ME: Speed adjustment area Name is invalid, please check for illegal characters
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.WINDOW_OPEN_CLOSE_MUST_BE_DIFFERENT: Close time should be after open time
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.PHONE_NUMBERS_CANT_BE_SAME: You have already entered this number, please enter a unique number
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.URL_VALIDATION_MESSAGE: Please enter a valid HTTPS URL
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.WORKSPACE_NAME_VALIDATION_MESSAGE: Workspace Name is invalid, please check for illegal characters
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.UNAVAILABILITY_PERIOD_START_AFTER_END: Unavailablity period start time should be earlier than the end time
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.EXTERNAL_ID_VALIDATION_MESSAGE: External ID should only contain alphanumeric characters, underscores (_), or hyphens (-)
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.STARTDATE_MINVAL: Start date must not be before today or primary license date.
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.STARTDATE_MAXVAL: Start date must not be after primary license expiry date.
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.EXPIRYDATE_BEFORE_PRIMARY: Expiry date must not be after primary license expiry date.
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.FIELD_CANNOT_BE_EMPTY_IF_POD_INTEGRATION: Field cannot be empty when pod integration is enabled.
VALIDATION_MESSAGES.RURAL_GREATER_URBAN: Rural speed should be greater or equal to corresponding Urban speed.

FORMFIELDTOOLTIPS.SCHEDULENUMBEROFMEASURES:
Measures are units used throughout the system to control the resource consumed within a schedule. The measures Weight and Volume will be created by default, but you may want to change this and add additional measures to suit your needs, for example Pallets or Liter's etc. 

 Once a schedule has been created it is not possible to change the number of measures.

To increase the number of routes supported by your license please contact your account manager.
